round_note: Signal/learnability phase, round 1. First feature engineering round after learnability diagnostic phase transition. Narrow scope: price-volume correlation family only.
research_question: 在当前已有特征空间内，针对 learnability diagnostic 确认含有弱 oracle-related information 的 price-volume correlation 家族做定向特征工程，是否能把 median daily IC 从 0.0325 明显抬升到 >= 0.040？
change_detail: 在 price-volume correlation 家族上新增 2 个结构性特征方向。A: Window-Ensemble Correlation (多窗口 cord rank ensemble)。B: Cross-Horizon Correlation Delta (跨窗口 cord rank 差异)。不改变: score family 以外合约、TopK、执行语义、成本合同、基准、portfolio refresh rule、holding_cohort_count、snapshot、数据源。不引入新数据源。不修改合约参数。不碰 D10。

pv_corr_ensemble_v1.name: Window-Ensemble Correlation
pv_corr_ensemble_v1.hypothesis: Oracle label is sensitive to price-volume co-movement at multiple time scales simultaneously. A single 30d window discards horizon-specific information recoverable by combining short, medium, and long windows.
pv_corr_ensemble_v1.method: Compute cord (change-correlation) at 3 windows (10d, 30d, 60d). Rank-normalize each cross-sectionally. Output: mean(cord_rank_10d, cord_rank_30d, cord_rank_60d).
pv_corr_ensemble_v1.expected_relationship_to_baseline: Extension of cord30. Adds horizon diversity to the single-window baseline.

pv_corr_delta_v1.name: Cross-Horizon Correlation Delta
pv_corr_delta_v1.hypothesis: The change in price-volume correlation across time scales captures regime acceleration/deceleration structurally absent from all current family members.
pv_corr_delta_v1.method: cord_delta_short = cord_rank_10d - cord_rank_30d. cord_delta_long = cord_rank_20d - cord_rank_60d. Output: mean(cord_delta_short, cord_delta_long).
pv_corr_delta_v1.expected_relationship_to_baseline: Orthogonal to cord30. Measures change rate rather than correlation level.

success_rules.tier_1_absolute: At least one candidate achieves median daily IC >= 0.040 with bootstrap 95% CI (10k resamples, seed=42) excluding zero.
success_rules.tier_2_relative: The same candidate shows median daily IC delta >= +0.005 over baseline cord30 (candidate_median - 0.0325 >= 0.005).
success_rules.core_pass_condition: Both Tier 1 AND Tier 2 must be met by at least one candidate.
success_rules.stop_condition: If both candidates have median IC <= 0.035 AND neither clears +0.005 delta over cord30, the family is considered saturated. Do NOT expand to Direction C or more cord variants. Re-open data acquisition discussion.
success_rules.ic_computation_method: Spearman rank correlation (CORR of cross-sectional percent-rank scores vs oracle label_5d_next_open_close). Daily IC aggregated over all trading days in trainval snapshot where >= 20 stocks have non-null scores and labels.

exclusions.reversal_sign_flip: Deferred to post-round standalone check. Not included in this round.
exclusions.direction_c_correlation_quality: Held for possible round 2, only if round 1 passes.

serial_rule: Signal/learnability phase 第一轮。如果两个候选都不达标，pv-corr family 视为饱和，重开 data acquisition 讨论。如果任一候选达标，进入 round 2 (Direction C + family composite)。
